_comment_permissions: Allow/deny lists for Bash and other tools. Add specific commands you trust to skip the permission prompt. See https://docs.claude.com/en/docs/claude-code/settings
_comment_hooks: Lifecycle hooks. ALL EXAMPLES BELOW ARE COMMENTED-OUT-EQUIVALENT (the 'hooks' object is empty). To enable, move an entry from '_examples' into 'hooks' AND verify the command works in your environment.

PreToolUse._doc: Block dangerous commands before execution. matcher selects which tools to hook into.

PostToolUse._doc: Auto-lint after any file write. WARNING — requires a working `npm run lint` in this project. Verify before enabling.

SessionStart._doc: Print project context summary at session start.

SessionEnd._doc: Save a session summary to a log file on session end.

PreCommit._doc: Scan staged changes for secrets before commit.

Notification._doc: Forward Claude notifications to Slack / Telegram / etc.

_comment_env: Environment variables that affect Claude Code's runtime behavior.
